channel.title: bothSidesHeadlinesNLmindYourBusiness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from bothSidesHeadlinesNLmindYourBusiness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Cell, gene and specialty drug costs intensify
item.description: New therapies are driving up costs for health plans and employers as patient demand rises.

item.title: Key components of business finances explained
item.description: Budgeting, cash flow management and financial analysis are essential for business success.

item.title: What is non-online accounting software?
item.description: Benefits of traditional accounting software for businesses seeking offline solutions.

item.title: Manhattan TV unveils new 4K Freesat recorder
item.description: The S4-R offers access to over 100 channels and can record up to four at once.
